
### example 2  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=smaller} -->
 
```
void foo(unsigned a,
         unsigned b,
         unsigned c) {
  if (a != 0) {
    b -= c; // W
  }
  if (b < 5) {
    if (b > c) {
      a += b; // X
    }
    b += 4; // Y
  } else {
    a += 1; // Z
  }
  if (a + b != 7)
    INTERESTING();
}

```
 ![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-1.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-2.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-3.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-4.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-5.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-6.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-7.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=7}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-8.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=8}
![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-9.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=9}
 [Adapted from Hicks, ‘‘Symbolic Execution for Finding Bugs’’]{.mycredit}
